title: polypodium piloselloides var. ciliatum
intro: Polypodium piloselloides var. ciliatum, also known as the hairy polypody fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family, characterized by its unique hairy leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The health benefits of Polypodium piloselloides var. ciliatum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory function, and act as an antiseptic. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in herbal supplements, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
